baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Prepare this repo for a patch release and update the changelog.
evals.expected_output: A release preparation workflow that follows the repo's existing changelog, versioning, validation, and tag conventions.
assertions: Reads existing changelog and release workflows.
Preserves the repo's release format and tag style.
Includes only functional changelog entries and omits chores, docs-only updates, validation runs, and empty category headings.
Runs relevant release gates or reports blockers.
Does not invent a new release system.
